title: Ripples of the Past: Cream Addon
description: A Ripples of the Past addon, adding Cream
body:
**ATTENTION! Before installing Cream, you must install the Ripples of The Past mod!**

## Moveset:
## 

### Left Click Hotbar:
### 

Punch / Heavy Punch / Head Crush (Finisher)
Claw / Heavy Claw / Double Claw (Finisher)
Chop
Devour

-----------------------------------------------

### Right Click Hotbar:
### 

Block
Enter the Void / Exit the Void / Void Dash (While you are using Enter Cream)
Enter Cream / Exit Cream
Eat Item / Eat Item Stack

-----------------------------------------------

### WARNING!
### 

If you are planning to play with grave-like mods which is NOT part of the following list: 
- GraveStone Mod
- Enigmatic Graves
- Corpse 

Then it is highly recommended that you make sure to blacklist the IDs of those blocks/entities in the config under the "Blacklist Configs for Enter the Void and Void Dash" section. The ones I listed are already part of the blacklist, so they should not be deleted under any circumstances, unless you remove them from the blacklist.

-----------------------------------------------

CREDITS:

@mickey096 - For making the model of the stand, as well as the power icon.
@lefariuss - For helping and giving me the sounds for the Stand.
@mlgmcmarioplayer - For making the action icons and skins for the Stand.
@hk47bit - For helping with the replaceAction / getVisibleAction stuff for Enter the Void.
@makutazeml - For helping with the multiplayer issues that happened on LAN and fixing some extra problems.
@coop001 - For creating the awesome banner for the addon.
